title: bouncy-qq midnight craving paccheri namul-blanch-season dish pasta
description: a malty, bouncy-qq, midnight-craving croatian dish featuring paccheri pasta, namul-blanch-season, and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients. great for a mid-night snack or light dinner.
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the grated ginger and sauté for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute, until softened.
add the chopped sweet potatoes, cabbage, and carrots, and sauté for 5 minutes, until they start to tenderize.
add the namul-blanch-season, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
add the cooked paccheri pasta to the skillet and toss everything together, until the pasta is well coated with the sweet potato mixture.
transfer the pasta mixture to a serving dish and top with chopped parsley.
serve warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
enjoy as a mid-night snack or light dinner!
